m: Long straights and sharp turns make downforce a disadvantage. Set as low as possible.
An ongoing string of high speed corners make this a perfect track for significant downforce.
A mix of high and low-speed turns and moderate straights means downforce will be helpful here.
There are a few sections that will benefit from downforce. Increase aero downforce for School Circuit.
Maximize your setup for speed on the straights with little or no downforce.
Downforce will help through the esses and high-speed corners, but decrease or remove downforce for the short East Route circuit.
Run minimum downforce possible for all circuits.
Run high to max downforce on any of the Dubai circuits.
A moderate amount of downforce will help through several sections.
Run little to no downforce except on Road Circuits where low levels of downforce will help on a few turns.
Run little to no downforce.

full_name: Le Mans Circuit de la Sarthe
m: Run little to no downforce except on the Bugatti Circuit where medium to high levels of downforce can help.
Downforce will help throughout the course and help maintain speed onto the main straight.
Little or no downforce recommended because of the combination of straights and slow corners.
A continuous set of sweeping corners make this a perfect track for downforce.
Use plenty of downforce to carry speed throughout track.
Run low downforce to balance high-speed straights with sweeping corners on uphill section.
The combination of straights and high-speed corners make moderate downforce levels appropriate.
Run low to medium downforce for Nordschleife and Full Circuits to maintain top speed.
Significant downforce will help maintain speed through the mostly sweeping corners.
Downforce will help stay planted especially through the waterfront and tunnel sections.
Use downforce to help recover time through mid-speed corners. Consider lowering for East Route.
Medium to high downforce recommended.
Low or no downforce recommended. Club Circuit will benefit from slightly higher downforce.
Moderate amoutns of downforce will help through many sections of this track.
Use high downforce values to improve grip through numerous sweeping sections.
Downforce will help maintain grip through numerous mid and higher speed corners.
Moderate amounts of downforce will help on a few sections.
Run high downforce to help generate extra grip despite lower speeds.
Medium downforce recommended given the straights. Consider high downforce for shorter circuits.
Medium downforce recommended given the straights. Consider high downforce for shorter circuits.
Medium to high downforce with slightly less on Full and North circuits.
This is an aero-friendly circuit, with several turns that will benefit from extra downforce.
